ValidationRule.description: Prevents users from moving incident status backward.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
OR(
AND( ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Status),"Open"), ISPICKVAL(Status,"New") ),
AND( ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Status),"In Progress"), OR( ISPICKVAL(Status,"Open"), ISPICKVAL(Status,"New") ) ),
AND( ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Status),"Resolved"), OR( ISPICKVAL(Status,"In Progress"), ISPICKVAL(Status,"Open"), ISPICKVAL(Status,"New") ) ),
AND( ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Status),"Completed"), OR( ISPICKVAL(Status,"Resolved"), ISPICKVAL(Status,"In Progress"), ISPICKVAL(Status,"Open"), ISPICKVAL(Status,"New") ) )
)
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You cannot move to other stage stage
